## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.
- [ ] The change builds locally: `scripts/build.bat` (Windows) or `nvcc` invocation.
- [ ] Relevant tests were added or updated and pass (`scripts/build_test.bat`).
- [ ] Any crypto changes include test vectors and security notes.
- [ ] I have considered performance impact; included microbenchmark numbers if applicable.
- [ ] I have not included any private keys, secrets, or customer data.

## Security Considerations
- Does this change introduce any security-sensitive behavior? If yes, explain and reference `SECURITY.md`.

## Testing & Validation
- Describe how this change was tested. Include commands and environment details.

## Notes for reviewers
- Anything specific reviewers should look for (e.g., device-host boundary, constant-time concerns).
